nodes.context: Bootlegging, gambling, and nightclub operation in Galveston, Texas during Prohibition.
Rival gang controlling gambling and bootlegging in Galveston, Texas.
Major organized crime syndicate based in Chicago, involved in bootlegging and other rackets.
Successor to the Beach Gang, took over much of Galveston island after Prohibition.

edges.context: The two gangs fought for control of Galveston, with shootouts and hijackings common.
Frank Nitti of the Chicago Outfit was a business partner of Johnny Jack Nounes.
The Maceo Syndicate succeeded the Beach Gang and ordered the assassination of George Musey.
